titles.title: Lead Me On to the Deeper Life

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Lead me on to a deeper life Lord, You know what I face inside All the things that cause me strife, from You I cannot hide Bring perfect healing to my soul Healing and rest for me and peace of mind Peace of mind, peace of mind Healing and rest for me and peace of mind :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Dear Lord, there are times I am hindered while fulfilling my responsibilities of this life But You called me to walk in a place where the things that hinder my faith will be truly under my feet And by God’s spirit I will be in full control, and take good hold of all the things that's been promise in Your Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lead me on to a deeper life Lord, You know what I face inside All the things that cause me strife, from You I cannot hide Bring perfect healing to my soul Healing and rest for me and peace of mind Peace of mind, peace of mind Healing and rest for me and peace of mind

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've let so many things take me away from You, things that seem so important to do But deep in my heart there is a cry, a longing only you can satisfy, oh my God So I'm laying my sins and weights aside May your grace and mercy even more abound and lead me higher
